name: Ed Debevic's Coconut Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, whisk eggs for 1 minute.
2. Add vanilla and 1/4 cup sugar, then whisk until smooth.
3. Add flour and cornstarch; whisk until smooth.
4. Gradually add 3/4 cup milk, whisking continuously until smooth. Set aside.
5. In a stainless steel saucepan, combine 1-1/2 cups milk and half & half.
6. Sprinkle 1/2 cup plus 2-1/2 tablespoons sugar evenly over the mixture.
7. Do not stir; bring to a boil over medium heat.
8. Gradually whisk in the egg mixture into the saucepan, continuing to boil.
9. Keep whisking and cook for an additional 20 seconds.
10. Pour the mixture into a mixing bowl and whisk in butter until melted.
11. Fold in grated coconut.
12. Pour the coconut cream mixture into the baked pie shell.
13. Cover the pie completely with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours.
14. Remove the plastic wrap, cut into wedges, and top with whipped cream and toasted coconut.
